title: Augsburg, Bavaria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Augsburg, Bavaria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Augsburg is a city in Bavaria with a population of 296,000. One of Germany’s oldest cities, a Roman and Renaissance treasure with the Fuggerei, a vibrant cultural scene, and strong industrial roots.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
